config_entries.label: Update Interval
config_entries.description: Time between display updates. Default is 1s.

config_entries.label: Model
config_entries.description: The model to use, one of the following options:

config_entries.label: Col Start
config_entries.description: The starting column offset. Default value depends on **model**.

config_entries.label: CS Pin
config_entries.description: The CS pin.

config_entries.label: Mode
config_entries.description: Pin mode flags (input / output / pullup / pulldown / open_drain). Combine flags as needed — e.g. input + pullup for a button pulled to VCC.

config_entries.label: Input
config_entries.description: Set the input mode flag.

config_entries.label: Output
config_entries.description: Set the output mode flag.

config_entries.label: Pullup
config_entries.description: Set the pullup mode flag.

config_entries.label: Pulldown
config_entries.description: Set the pulldown mode flag.

config_entries.label: Open Drain
config_entries.description: Set the open drain mode flag.

config_entries.label: Inverted
config_entries.description: Invert the logical level. ``true`` swaps high/low in software so an active-low button reads as active when grounded.

config_entries.label: DC Pin
config_entries.description: The DC pin.

config_entries.label: Mode
config_entries.description: Pin mode flags (input / output / pullup / pulldown / open_drain). Combine flags as needed — e.g. input + pullup for a button pulled to VCC.

config_entries.label: Input
config_entries.description: Set the input mode flag.

config_entries.label: Output
config_entries.description: Set the output mode flag.

config_entries.label: Pullup
config_entries.description: Set the pullup mode flag.

config_entries.label: Pulldown
config_entries.description: Set the pulldown mode flag.

config_entries.label: Open Drain
config_entries.description: Set the open drain mode flag.

config_entries.label: Inverted
config_entries.description: Invert the logical level. ``true`` swaps high/low in software so an active-low button reads as active when grounded.

config_entries.label: Device Height
config_entries.description: The device height. 160 is default

config_entries.label: Device Width
config_entries.description: The device width. 128 is default

config_entries.label: Lambda
config_entries.description:
**Set at most one of:** `pages`, `lambda`.

The lambda to use for rendering the content on the display. `it` will be an instance of <APIClass text="DisplayBuffer" path="display::DisplayBuffer" />. See [Display Rendering Engine](https://esphome.io/components/display#display-engine) for more information.

config_entries.label: Pages
config_entries.description:
**Set at most one of:** `pages`, `lambda`.

Show pages instead of a single lambda. See [Display Pages](https://esphome.io/components/display#display-pages).

config_entries.label: Reset Pin
config_entries.description: The RESET pin.

config_entries.label: Mode
config_entries.description: Pin mode flags (input / output / pullup / pulldown / open_drain). Combine flags as needed — e.g. input + pullup for a button pulled to VCC.

config_entries.label: Input
config_entries.description: Set the input mode flag.

config_entries.label: Output
config_entries.description: Set the output mode flag.

config_entries.label: Pullup
config_entries.description: Set the pullup mode flag.

config_entries.label: Pulldown
config_entries.description: Set the pulldown mode flag.

config_entries.label: Open Drain
config_entries.description: Set the open drain mode flag.

config_entries.label: Inverted
config_entries.description: Invert the logical level. ``true`` swaps high/low in software so an active-low button reads as active when grounded.

config_entries.label: Row Start
config_entries.description: The starting row offset. Default value depends on **model**.

config_entries.label: Auto Clear Enabled
config_entries.description: Whether to automatically clear the display data before each lambda call, or to keep the existing display content (must overwrite explicitly, e.g., only on data change). Defaults to `true` if a lambda or pages are configured, false otherwise.

config_entries.label: Eight Bit Color
config_entries.description: 8bit mode. Default is false. This saves 50% of the buffer required for the display.

config_entries.label: Invert Colors
config_entries.description: Invert LCD colors. Default is false.

config_entries.label: Rotation
config_entries.description: Set the rotation of the display. Everything you draw in `lambda:` will be rotated by this option. One of `0°` (default), `90°`, `180°`, `270°`.

config_entries.label: Use BGR
config_entries.description: Use BGR mode. Default is false.
